hook: AI gave me a 5-paragraph essay when I needed a one-line answer. Again.
caption:
AI gave me a 5-paragraph essay when I needed a one-line answer. Again.

Here's what's actually happening: the AI doesn't know if you're a "give me the full picture" person or a "just tell me the answer" person.

So it guesses. And it usually guesses wrong.

The Synthesizer type gets walls of text when they wanted a single sharp insight.

The Executor type gets cautious, hedged disclaimers when they wanted a clear next step.

The Visionary type gets a literal answer to a question they meant metaphorically.

Nobody told the AI which one you are.

That's the whole problem.

BootFile builds a profile around how YOUR brain actually processes information — your preferred depth, your decision-making style, your tolerance for nuance. Then it gives that context to the AI before you even type your first word.

Same question. Completely different answer. One that actually fits.

You shouldn't have to re-explain how you think every single time you open a chat window.
